category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Guatemala market entry (SIT / MIEM / COGUANOR).

title.en: China-to-Guatemala Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (SIT / MIEM / COGUANOR)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入危地马拉：合规差距矩阵（SIT / MIEM / COGUANOR）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入瓜地馬拉：合規差距矩陣（SIT / MIEM / COGUANOR）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Guatemalan SIT mandatory homologación (type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones, Decreto 94-96, and SIT resolutions), COGUANOR NGO (Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria) electrical safety and EMC standards (many harmonised with IEC/ISO/COPANT), the Guatemalan authorized importer requirement (NIT/SAT registration), and the advisory cybersecurity framework under Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública. Guatemala uses 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B (US-style) plugs. SIT homologación is mandatory before import or sale; CCC is not recognised, though FCC and CE test reports may serve as a useful basis within the SIT technical dossier. An authorized Guatemalan importer with NIT/SAT registration is required. Spanish labelling is required. Guatemala is the largest economy in Central America (~18 million population), with significant Chinese trade presence and imports arriving via Puerto Quetzal and Santo Tomás de Castilla.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与危地马拉SIT强制型式认可（依据《电信总法》Decreto 94-96及SIT决议对无线电及电信终端设备的型号认证）、COGUANOR NGO（危地马拉强制性标准）电气安全和EMC标准（多与IEC/ISO/COPANT协调）、危地马拉授权进口商要求（NIT/SAT注册）及《公众信息获取法》框架下网络安全指导性建议的差距对照。危地马拉采用120V/60Hz、A/B型（美式）插头。进口或销售前须取得SIT型式认可；CCC不被承认，但FCC和CE检测报告可作为SIT技术文件的有用基础。须有持NIT/SAT注册的授权危地马拉进口商。须使用西班牙语标签。危地马拉是中美洲最大经济体（约1800万人口），中危贸易往来密切，进口货物经由克萨尔港和圣多马斯德卡斯蒂利亚港入境。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與瓜地馬拉SIT強制型式認可（依據《電信總法》Decreto 94-96及SIT決議對無線電及電信終端裝置的型號認證）、COGUANOR NGO（瓜地馬拉強制性標準）電氣安全和EMC標準（多與IEC/ISO/COPANT協調）、瓜地馬拉授權進口商要求（NIT/SAT註冊）及《公眾資訊取得法》框架下網路安全指導性建議的差距對照。瓜地馬拉採用120V/60Hz、A/B型（美式）插頭。進口或銷售前須取得SIT型式認可；CCC不被承認，但FCC和CE檢測報告可作為SIT技術文件的有用基礎。須有持NIT/SAT註冊的授權瓜地馬拉進口商。須使用西班牙語標籤。瓜地馬拉是中美洲最大經濟體（約1800萬人口），中瓜貿易往來密切，進口貨物經由克薩爾港和聖多馬斯德卡斯蒂利亞港入境。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, SIT homologación, COGUANOR certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current SIT resolutions, COGUANOR NGO standards, electrical safety and EMC requirements, Guatemalan importer registration obligations under NIT/SAT, plug and voltage requirements, SAT customs requirements, and Spanish labelling rules with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Guatemala.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、SIT型式认可、COGUANOR认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向危地马拉发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行SIT决议、COGUANOR NGO标准、电气安全和EMC要求、NIT/SAT下的危地马拉进口商注册义务、插头和电压要求、SAT海关要求及西班牙语标签规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、SIT型式認可、COGUANOR認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向瓜地馬拉發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行SIT決議、COGUANOR NGO標準、電氣安全和EMC要求、NIT/SAT下的瓜地馬拉進口商註冊義務、插頭和電壓要求、SAT海關要求及西班牙語標籤規則。

answer_first.en: The main Guatemala compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: SIT mandatory homologación under Ley General de Telecomunicaciones (Decreto 94-96) — all radio and telecom terminal equipment requires a SIT homologación certificate before import or sale, with no recognition of CCC or SRRC approvals; FCC and CE test reports may be used as a basis within the SIT technical dossier but do not substitute for the Guatemalan certificate; an authorized Guatemalan importer with NIT/SAT registration is required; COGUANOR NGO electrical safety and EMC compliance (standards harmonised with IEC/ISO/COPANT); product compatibility with Guatemala's 120 V / 60 Hz power system and Type A/B (US-style) plugs; Spanish language labelling; and advisory cybersecurity obligations under Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública with no specific product cybersecurity certification law currently in force.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入危地马拉的主要合规差距为：依据《电信总法》（Decreto 94-96）的SIT强制型式认可——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前须取得SIT型式认可证书，不认可CCC或SRRC核准；FCC和CE检测报告可作为SIT技术文件的基础，但不能替代危地马拉证书；须有持NIT/SAT注册的授权危地马拉进口商；COGUANOR NGO电气安全和EMC合规（标准与IEC/ISO/COPANT协调）；产品与危地马拉120V/60Hz电源系统及A/B型（美式）插头的兼容性；西班牙语标签要求；以及《公众信息获取法》框架下的指导性网络安全义务（目前尚无专门的产品网络安全认证法律）。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入瓜地馬拉的主要合規差距為：依據《電信總法》（Decreto 94-96）的SIT強制型式認可——所有無線電及電信終端裝置在進口或銷售前須取得SIT型式認可證書，不認可CCC或SRRC核准；FCC和CE檢測報告可作為SIT技術文件的基礎，但不能替代瓜地馬拉證書；須有持NIT/SAT註冊的授權瓜地馬拉進口商；COGUANOR NGO電氣安全和EMC合規（標準與IEC/ISO/COPANT協調）；產品與瓜地馬拉120V/60Hz電源系統及A/B型（美式）插頭的相容性；西班牙語標籤要求；以及《公眾資訊取得法》框架下的指導性網路安全義務（目前尚無專門的產品網路安全認證法律）。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
